subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the breaths of God! Thy brilliant letter hath reached me and through it was received mention of thy arrival [3.5s]... ...You have asked about visiting holy places and the observance of marked reverence toward these resplendent spots. Holy places are undoubtedly centers of the outpouring of Divine grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله قد وصلنی تحریرک البدیع و به ذکرت ورود
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @Greatest Name, @symbolism, @law of pilgrimage
